venues.name: CRUMB
venues.description: Newcastle's new cult favourite with lines forming before opening. Creative croissants, gooey cookies, and matcha offerings that have TikTok obsessed. The most requested spot in comments for good reason.
venues.mustTry: Creative croissants, gooey cookies, hot or iced matcha, freshly baked pastries (arrive early!)

venues.name: La Bae
venues.description: Newcastle's newest TikTok sensation that opened in April 2025. Asian-inspired cafe kicking off everyone's croffle cravings with a mixture of savoury and sweets. The strawberry matcha is so good you'll need a second cup for takeaway.
venues.mustTry: Croffles (croissant-waffles), viral strawberry matcha, Asian fusion breakfast dishes, hot & cold drink selection

venues.name: Liebe European Pastries
venues.description: European-style pastries made fresh daily with a new line-up every week. Started at Newcastle Farmers Market, now has a permanent home and often sells out before closing time.
venues.mustTry: Fresh croissants, European pastries, focaccia, weekly specials (Wed-Sun only, sells out early)

venues.name: Bootleg Bakery
venues.description: The cult-favourite red food truck that only opens Friday & Saturday from 8am-12pm. The lines speak for themselves — get there early before the Bootstrap bread and ever-changing pastries sell out.
venues.mustTry: Iconic Bootstrap savoury bread, focaccia, danishes, tarts, specialty coffee (EFTPOS only, Fri/Sat 8am-12pm)

venues.name: Outdo Espresso
venues.description: With 28K Instagram followers, this is home to Flamingo Coffee and those mouth-watering toasties everyone can't stop talking about. The matcha topped with cold foam flavours is top-tier. Sleek, modern vibe with sandalwood scent.
venues.mustTry: Mac & cheese toastie (when available), chicken pesto toastie, iced matcha with cold foam, Flamingo Coffee blend

venues.name: Two Bobs Bakery & Pantry
venues.description: Following the success of their Nelson Bay store, Two Bobs brought their signature sourdough and decadent pastries to Newcastle. Known for sourdough-based creations that have locals lining up.
venues.mustTry: Sour cherry & pistachio scroll (must-try!), signature sourdough, sourdough-based pastries (Wed-Sun)

venues.name: Praise Joe
venues.description: A buzzing corner cafe known for specialty coffee, rotating pastry specials, and some of the best toasted sandwiches in town. The local favorite that keeps Tighes Hill caffeinated and happy.
venues.mustTry: Best toasted sandwiches in Newcastle, rotating pastry specials, specialty coffee (open 7 days)

venues.name: Momo Wholefood Co
venues.description: Making waves on TikTok's Newcastle foodie recommendations. Wholefood focus with fresh, nourishing options that don't compromise on flavor.
venues.mustTry: Wholefood breakfast bowls, nourishing lunch options, fresh juices, plant-based menu items

venues.name: Sonny & Betty
venues.description: Created by the team behind Cakeboi, this cosy spot offers a daily-changing selection of warm, freshly baked pastries that are seriously addictive. Each visit brings new delights to try.
venues.mustTry: Daily-changing pastries, warm freshly baked goods, specialty coffee (Tue-Sun)

venues.name: Monte
venues.description: Brand new cafe that opened late 2024 and already getting TikTok reviews. The newest breakfast spot creating buzz in Newcastle's CBD with quality coffee and fresh takes on cafe classics.
venues.mustTry: Breakfast menu, specialty coffee, cafe classics with creative twists
